Germany 's Agriculture Ministry suggested on Wednesday that consumers avoid eating meat from British sheep until scientists determine whether mad cow disease can be transmitted to the animals .

Text:

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
British officials say sheep meat is perfectly safe to eat .

Text:
TENNIS - NEWCOMBE PONDERS HIS DAVIS CUP FUTURE .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
SYDNEY 1996-08-22

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Australian Davis Cup captain John Newcombe on Thursday signalled his possible resignation if his team loses an away tie against Croatia next month .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The former Wimbledon champion said the immediate future of Australia 's Davis Cup coach Tony Roche could also be determined by events in Split .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" If we lose this one , Tony and I will have to have a good look at giving someone else a go , " Newcombe was quoted as saying in Sydney 's Daily Telegraph newspaper .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Australia face Croatia in the world group qualifying tie on clay from September 20-22 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Under Newcombe 's leadership , Australia were relegated from the elite world group last year , the first time the 26-time Davis Cup winners had slipped from the top rank .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Since taking over as captain from Neale Fraser in 1994 , Newcombe 's record in tandem with Roche , his former doubles partner , has been three wins and three losses .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Newcombe has selected Wimbledon semifinalist Jason Stoltenberg , Patrick Rafter , Mark Philippoussis , and Olympic doubles champions Todd Woodbridge and Mark Woodforde to face the Croatians .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The home side boasts world number six Goran Ivanisevic , and Newcombe conceded his players would be hard-pressed to beat the Croatian number one .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" We are ready to fight to our last breath -- Australia must play at its absolute best to win , " said Newcombe , who described the tie as the toughest he has faced as captain .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Australia last won the Davis Cup in 1986 , but they were beaten finalists against Germany three years ago under Fraser 's guidance .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Essex are set to step up their English county championship challenge with a fifth consecutive victory after new-ball pair Neil Williams and Mark Ilott sent Gloucestershire reeling on Saturday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Williams seized two wickets in two deliveries and left-armer Ilott also captured two as Gloucestershire , 252 behind on first innings , slumped to 27 for four at the close on the third day of the four-day game at Colchester .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Essex , who started the current round of matches in fifth place 20 points behind leaders Derbyshire with a game in hand , could go top if they complete victory on Monday 's last day and other results favour them .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Williams thrust Essex on course for success by dispatching Matt Windows and Andrew Symonds in his second over , before Ilott removed Dominic Hewson and Tim Hancock to reduce Gloucestershire to 17 for four at one stage .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Extract named entities as JSON.

Extract named entities as JSON.

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
SOCCER - DISAPPOINTING AJAX SLUMP 2-0 AT HEERENVEEN .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
AMSTERDAM 1996-08-24

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Dutch champions Ajax Amsterdam faltered in their second league match of the season on Saturday losing 2-0 away at Heerenveen .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Ajax , who had a dismal series of pre-season results before beating NAC of Breda in their opening game , had the best of an entertaining first half but failed to break the deadlock .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Eight minutes after the interval , Heerenveen 's Romeo Wouden broke through the Amsterdam defence , left defender John Veldman standing and curled the ball beyond goalkeeper Edwin van der Sar into the Ajax net .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Ajax , without injured defenders Marcio Santos and Winston Bogarde and strikers Jari Litmanen and Marc Overmars , then stepped up the pace and looked certain to equalise .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But they left gaps at the back and on 73 minutes Danish striker Jon Dahl Tomasson rushed out of his own half , beat the Ajax defence and lobbed van der Sar .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The defeat means Ajax 's main title contenders PSV Eindhoven , who beat the champions 3-0 in the traditional league curtain-raiser , can go three points clear of their rivals if they beat Groningen on Sunday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

British hostage in Chechnya describes ordeal .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
LONDON 1996-08-24

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
A British aid worker , held hostage in Chechnya for nearly four weeks , said on Saturday a cocked Kalashnikov had been thrust into his mouth at one point during his ordeal .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Michael Penrose , a 23-year-old worker with the group Action Against Hunger , described his ordeal to a news conference when he arrived back in Britain from Moscow .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" The worst period of physical manhandling was during that time when we were beaten with Kalashnikovs and at one point I had a Kalashnikov held to the back of my throat -- cocked , " he said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" For the first period we were held in a small room with no bed or anything .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
We had very little food and sometimes went two or three days without eating . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Gunmen seized Penrose , who comes from Swerford in southern England , Frenchman Frederic Malardeau and six other hostages from their car in Grozny , the capital of Chechnya , on July 27 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The assailants had demanded a ransom of 300,000 pounds ( $ 465,000 ) but no money was paid by the charity when they were released on Wednesday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The hostages were held in a house in or near Grozny which was bombarded regularly .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" During the last 15 days of being held , the fighting in Grozny was very close .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
At first it was street fighting outside the house and then we came under very heavy shelling and bombardment from conventional weapons like tanks , artillery and grenade launchers , " he said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Penrose had been working for the charity which provides food to civilians for only a few weeks before he was captured .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
When asked if he would return to the mountainous region where rebels have been fighting Russian troops for full independence , Penrose said : " Not for the time being .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
I do n't think it 's safe for me .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But maybe in the future , depending on the circumstances . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Adventurers start Canadian wilderness race .

Text:
PEMBERTON , British Columbia 1996-08-24

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
About 350 adventurers from nine countries set out on Saturday to climb , raft , bike and run in a 323-mile ( 517-km ) endurance race through the Canadian wilderness .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The event , called the Eco-Challenge , is part of a growing sport known as adventure racing in which competitors test their limits for days over a perilous wilderness course .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" I 'm looking forward to this race .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
I think it will be more physically challenging and we 'll have to go up against more diverse situations due to the terrain , " said Dr. Michael Stroud , a veteran Eco-Challenge participant .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The Eco-Challenge has been staged twice before -- in Utah and Maine last year -- and is modelled on similar races overseas .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The 70 teams in this year 's race will will trek glaciers , climb mountains , whitewater raft , horseback ride , canoe and mountain bike along the grueling course .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
This year 's race , the route of which was keep a secret until Friday evening , is being held near Pemberton , British Columbia , about 100 miles ( 160 km ) northeast of Vancouver .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The area is filled with treacherous mountain peaks , ice fields and frigid waters .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Organisers expect about two-thirds of the participants to drop out or be disqualified before the finish .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The hardy ones are expected to complete the course in about six days , with first-place finishers receiving $ 10,000 in prize money .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
In the Eco-Challenge , competitors race in teams of five which must include both men and women .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Team members must remain within 100 yards ( metres ) of each other at all times and finish together .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
With racers carrying about 40 pounds ( 18 kg ) of gear on their backs , broken bones , sunstroke , dehydration and exhaustion are common .

Zimbabwe fires striking civil servants .

Emelia Sithole

Text:
HARARE 1996-08-24

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The Zimbabwean government fired thousands of workers on Saturday for defying an order to end a strike which has crippled essential services and disrupted international and domestic flights .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The Public Service Commission ( PSC ) said in a statement that the workers -- including nurses , junior doctors , mortuary attendants , customs officers and firefighters -- would be barred from entering their workplaces on Monday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" All civil servants who did not return to work at their normal working hours , and remained working for the full working day on 23 August 1996 , have been summarily dismissed ...

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
with immediate effect , " it said in a statement .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Union officials from the Public Service Association ( PSA ) were unavailable for comment .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Public Service , Labour and Social Welfare Minister Florence Chitauro told state radio her ministry had already begun recruiting other people to replace the strikers , sub-contracting some of the work to private firms .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The government had been threatening to fire the workers since the strike began on Tuesday , saying it was illegal .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But the strikers ignored the threat and vowed to stay on the streets until their demands for wage rises of 30 to 60 percent were met .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
It has also disrupted flights .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Some internal services were cancelled , leaving tourists at the Victoria Falls resort stranded , and flights abroad were delayed .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The PSA said 80 percent of the country 's 180,000 civil servants took part in the strike which is a rare challenge to President Robert Mugabe , who has been in power since independence from Britain in 1980 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Civil servants earn on average Z$ 1,000 ( $ 100 ) a month .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Out of these 17 were former soldiers .

These people are now in Gisenyi prison , " Gatera added .

A limelight-loving South African chief was in disgrace on Saturday after a prized skull he brought home from Scotland was identified as belonging not to his sacred tribal ancestor , but to a middle-aged white woman .

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But Gcaleka ran into trouble as soon as he returned to South Africa with a skull he found in a cottage in a lonely Highland forest near Inverness .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
He said the spirit of a hurricane had guided him there .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Members of the Xhosa royal family , branding Gcaleka a charlatan , confiscated the head and sent it for tests to a forensic scientist , who examined the shape of the skull and the hole that he determined had not come , as supposed , from a bullet .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" It can be stated beyond reasonable doubt that this skull is not that of the late king , " the scientist said in a statement .

Text:
GOLF - MICKELSON WINS FOURTH TITLE OF YEAR IN AKRON .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
AKRON , Ohio 1996-08-25

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Phil Mickelson birdied two of the last three holes to win World Series of Golf by three strokes over Billy Mayfair on Sunday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
It was the fourth tournament title this year for Mickelson , who shot an even-par 70 , after being tied for the lead with Billy Mayfair with three holes to play .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Along with Mayfiar at 277 for the tournament were Steve Stricker , who had a 68 , and Duffy Waldorf , with a 66 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" It was very hard to sleep last night because there was so much I could accomplish with this win , " said Mickelson , who had a three-stroke lead entering the third round . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
This was a win I wanted very , very much . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Mickelson 's victory gave him a 10 year exemption to the PGA Tour .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The $ 378,000 first place check brings Mickelson back to the top of the money list with $ 1,574,799 won this year .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" This is a major championship golf course , and for me to perform well on this style of course is a big step up for me in my career and my performance in future majors , " he said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Mickelson three-stroke lead was cut to two when Mayfair birdied the course 's only easy hole , the par five second hole , while Mickelson three-putted for par from 25 feet .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
On the back nine Mickelson began driving erratically , and poor tee shots resulted in bogeys on the , eighth , 12th and 13th holes , bringing Mickelson back to four under par , tied with Mayfair , who had parred 14 straight holes after the birdie on no.2 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Mickelson then set up a tap in birdie on the 16th , sending a wedge shot to 18 inches .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
He had another birdie on the 17th , where he his a 6-iron to six feet .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Mayfair bogeyed the 17th , missing a five foot par putt , and dropped from solo second place to a three way tie for second .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
It was the second successive year in which Mayfair has finished runner up in this tournament .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
He lost to Greg Norman in sudden death last year .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The defending champion was in contention , two behind Mickelson for much of the day , until he bogeyed the 13th and 14th holes .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
MOTORCYCLING - JAPANESE WIN BOTH ROUND NINE SUPERBIKE RACES .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
SUGO , Japan 1996-08-25

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Teenager Yuuichi Takeda , racing in only his first season , outclassed the big names to win the first race in round nine of the world superbike championship on Sunday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Takeda , 18 , showed poise far beyond his years to overtake Australian Ducati rider Troy Corser , last year 's championship runner-up , with four of the 25 laps left .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Honda 's Takeda was pursued past Corser by the Yamaha duo of Noriyuki Haga and Wataru Yoshikawa with Haga briefly taking the lead in the final chicane on the last lap .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But Takeda found one more spurt of power to just take the flag first with Haga second and Yoshikawa third .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Haga had the consolation of recording the fastest lap at 147.159 kph .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Corser , who crashed during practice on Friday , limped in fourth , four seconds behind Takeda with championship leader Aaron Slight of New Zealand 11 seconds behind the winner .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
In the second race , Takeda again challenged strongly until the fifth lap from the end when he crashed while running second to eventual race winner Takuma Aoki .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Aoki , the elder brother of reigning 125cc world champion Haruchika , had a race-long duel with John Kocinski of the United States on a Ducati before taking the chequered flag .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Kocinski led for the early laps before he was passed first by Aoki , who recorded the fastest lap of 147.786 kph , and then by Takeda .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
With Takeda out of the race , Kocinski regained second place but he could not overtake Aoki .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Haga again was the unlucky rider finishing third ahead of Slight with Corser in 10th place .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But the strong showing by the Japanese riders did not alter the championship table with Slight still leading on 280 points , followed by Corser with 269 and Kocinski with 254 .

South African fast bowler Shaun Pollock concluded his Warwickshire career with a flourish on Sunday by taking the final three wickets during the county 's Sunday league victory over Worcestershire .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Yorkshire eventually reached their target with only four wickets down and 7.5 overs to spare .

Text:
LONDON 1996-08-25

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Chris Lewis did his best to forget his controversial omission from the England one-day squad on Sunday but could not prevent Pakistan reasserting their dominance in the final test at The Oval .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
A super piece of fielding by Lewis , dropped as a disciplinary measure after arriving only 35 minutes before the start on the fourth morning , provided the only bright spot for England as the touring team batted on to reach 413 for five at the interval , a lead of 87 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The solitary wicket to fall was Asif Mujtaba , run out for 13 attempting a second run to third man where Lewis was lurking with a point to prove .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
There seemed scant danger until the Surrey player swooped on to the ball and returned off balance to county team mate Alec Stewart who whipped off the bails .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Lewis , though , could not make similar waves with the ball as Salim Malik and Wasim Akram batted through the rest of the session with few alarms .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Wasim rattled along to 30 not out , outscoring his partner who was unbeaten on 24 at the break , although the weather was again threatening to play the dominant role .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Rain arrived just as the players left the field for lunch , forcing the ground-staff into action yet again .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

South Africa 's truth commission begins issuing subpoenas this week in a bid to dig beneath the political rationales and find the sinister figures who have the blood of the country 's race war on their hands .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Leaders of the major parties involved , from right-wing whites to radical blacks , appeared before Archbishop Desmond Tutu 's Truth and Reconciliation Commission last week to paint the broad picture of their actions for or against apartheid .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Most , including former president F.W. de Klerk and African National Congress Deputy President Thabo Mbeki , offered apologies for any mistakes they had made and accepted broad responsibility for the actions of their foot soldiers .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But none named those guilty of ordering or carrying out any of the gross violations of human rights which Tutu is investigating .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Human rights lawyer Brian Currin said the hearings last week were not intended as a form of confessional and that those who personally committed crimes during apartheid would testify only before a separate arm of the commission , the amnesty committee .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" I do n't think one should have expected more than what one got , " he said . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
That was not the amnesty committee where perpetrators are expected to open their hearts and souls and to tell it all . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The commission , which has the power to grant amnesty to those who confess to abuses , has begun hearing the testimony from people already in jail for their deeds .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But others , such as self-confessed secret police hit-squad leader Dirk Coetzee , have yet to testify .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But Currin , who is advising several people regarded as perpetrators , said this was not the best way to achieve the commission 's aims .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" A person can be forced to appear , but the only way one is going to get to the truth in its totality is if people feel it is a good idea to go to the amnesty committee .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
At the moment this is not the case . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
He cited Coetzee , who was charged with murder after confessing in media interviews to dirty tricks .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Text:
NEW YORK 1996-08-23

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Corporate America is planning major changes in employee compensation in the next few years , according to a recent study .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
What it comes down to is this : If you 're highly skilled , you 'll benefit nicely .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But if you 're not and cannot contribute to your employer 's goals , you 'll be paid less .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The survey , conducted in late 1995 and the early part of this year by management consulting firm Towers Perrin , showed that the focus will be on an employee 's overall value to the company 's bottom line -- rather than how well an employee performs a specific task .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Presently , for example , if an accountant 's job involves doing five specific tasks , he or she can expect a certain salary , said Sandra O'Neal , a Towers Perrin principal .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
In the future , the accountant will be evaluated solely on " knowledge , skill and abilities , " she said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" The good news is , if you 're highly skilled and have many abilities , you 'll be paid more , " said O'Neal .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" The bad news is , if you 're not skilled and ca n't contribute to a team , to customer service and the organisation 's goals , you 'll be paid less . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

RALLYING - MAKINEN STEPS UP TITLE BID WITH LAKES WIN .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
JYVASKYLA , Finland 1996-08-26

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Tommi Makinen took a significant step towards becoming world rally champion with a brilliant victory in the 1000 Lakes Rally on Monday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Mitsubishi driver Makinen stopped experienced fellow Finn Juha Kankkunen in his tracks on the final day of the 1,452-km rally , doubling his lead on the first two decisive stages .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" This was the most difficult win - three days at 125 percent effort , " said Makinen , whose success completed his 1,000 Lakes hat-trick .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Kankkunen was runner-up in his Toyota as Finland 's Jarmo Kytolehto produced a remarkable drive to finish third in his Ford .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Swede Kenneth Eriksson kept Subaru in the hunt for the manufacturers ' title with fifth place in spite of a gearbox problem that nearly forced him off the road close to the end of the event .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Maakinen 's and Mitsubishi 's positions were strengthened by the late retirement of Spain 's Carlos Sainz when his Ford gearbox failed .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Makinen , with 95 points , now leads his nearest championship rival , Sainz , by 32 points .

Extract named entities as JSON.

SOCCER - SHARPE HITS WINNER TO EASE PRESSURE ON LEEDS .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
LEEDS , England 1996-08-26

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Winger Lee Sharpe hit a superb strike from the edge of the penalty area to give Leeds their first win of the season on Monday and leave hapless Wimbledon anchored at the bottom of the England premier league .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Sharpe repaid a huge slice of the 4.5 million pound ( $ 6.98 million ) fee Leeds handed Manchester United for his services with a top-draw second-half goal to hand Wimbledon their third successive defeat .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Ian Rush , the Welsh striker signed from Liverpool in the close season , set up the goal , feeding Sharpe as he galloped forward and the former England winger cut inside onto his unfavoured right foot to arc a shot into the right-hand corner of the net .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The only goal of the match also brought some relief for under-fire Leeds manager Howard Wilkinson following the team 's poor start to the season .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Home fans frequently booed their own side until Sharpe turned the jeers to cheers .

Text:
SOCCER - SEYCHELLES FAIL IN BID FOR HISTORIC VICTORY .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Mark Gleeson

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
JOHANNESBURG 1996-08-26

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The tiny islands of the Seychelles failed to make soccer history at the weekend when they bowed out of the preliminary rounds of the African Nations Cup .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Trailing fellow Indian Ocean islanders Mauritius 1-0 from the first leg , they were held to a 1-1 draw at home on Saturday despite playing against 10 men for most of the match .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The 2-1 aggregate took Mauritius into the group phase of the qualifiers for the 1998 finals , and kept up the Seychelles ' record of never having won an official match in their 10 years of FIFA membership .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The Seychelles must have thought they were on course for a historic breakthrough when Mauritian midfielder Andre Caboche was sent off for a crude tackle in the 19th minute .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But the visitors responded to the setback immediately -- veteran striker Ashley Mocude scoring a minute later to give them a two-goal aggregate lead .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Although Danny Rose 's 50th-minute equaliser gave the Seychellois renewed hope they could not find the net again and were eliminated .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Mauritius now play in group seven of the qualifiers against Malawi , Mozambique and favourites Zambia .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Namibia , who drew 0-0 with Botswana in their first leg , won the second leg in Windhoek 6-0 to stretch their unbeaten run to eight matches and continue their remarkable progress on the African soccer stage .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
They now play in group five with Cameroon , Gabon and Kenya .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
German-based striker Bachirou Salou returned home to Togo to score the decisive only goal of their tie against Congo .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Salou , who plays for MSV Duisburg in the Bundesliga , scored in the 53rd minute of Sunday 's match in Lome for a 1-0 aggregate win which takes his side into group six , where they will meet Liberia , Tanzania and Zaire .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Ethiopia needed a penalty shoot-out in Addis Ababa to overcome Uganda after a 2-2 aggregate scoreline .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Both legs ended 1-1 before Ethiopia won the spot kick decider 4-2 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Uganda 's elimination follows their humiliating 5-1 aggregate defeat by Angola in June 's World Cup qualifying preliminaries .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The other preliminary round second leg match , between Mauritania and Benin in Nouakchott , was postponed until Friday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Benin won the first leg 4-1 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
MOSCOW 1996-08-26

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Russian double Olympic swimming champion Alexander Popov was in a serious condition on Monday after being stabbed on a Moscow street .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
A doctor said it was too early to say whether Popov , the only man to retain the Olympic 50 and 100 metres freestyle titles , would return to top-level sport .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" His condition is serious , " said Rimma Maslova , deputy chief doctor of Hospital No 31 in the Russian capital . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But he is conscious and is talking and smiling . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Maslova told Reuters she was not an expert in sports medicine , but said it was too early to judge Popov 's chances of returning to competitive swimming .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Popov , who won gold in the 50 and 100 metres freestyle at the recent Atlanta Olympics , was stabbed in the abdomen late on Saturday after an argument with a group of roadside watermelon sellers in south-west Moscow .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Maslova said the wound had affected a lung and a kidney .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Doctors operated on Popov , 24 , for three hours .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Popov told NTV television on Sunday he was in no danger and promised he would be back in the pool shortly . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
There 's no need to worry .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
We 're going to be walking soon -- and swimming , " he insisted cheerfully from his bed in the intensive care unit .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Interfax news agency said police had detained one of the attackers .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
It said the row started when Popov and a group of his friends were returning from a party .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Vitaly Smirnov , president of the Russian National Olympic Committee , said President Boris Yeltsin had given the swimmer Russia 's top award for his Olympic performance . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
I am not a doctor but I think he is doing all right , " said Smirnov .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Smirnov said the Olympic Committee might ask the government to take measures to protect the country 's best athletes , some of whom have already chosen to live abroad for fear of a surge in crime in post-Soviet Russia .

Text:
CRICKET - GOOCH TO PLAY ANOTHER SEASON FOR ESSEX .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
LONDON 1996-08-27

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Graham Gooch , the 43-year-old former England captain , is to continue playing county cricket for at least another season , his club Essex announced on Tuesday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Opener Gooch 's decision comes towards the end of a season in which he has underlined his consistency by becoming the leading scorer in Essex 's history , beating Keith Fletcher 's aggregate of 29,434 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Gooch , who retired from test cricket after the 1994-95 tour of Australia but is now an England selector , is seventh in this season 's first-class averages with 1,429 runs at 64.95 , having hit five centuries and one double century .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Essex secretary-general manager Peter Edwards said : " He is a remarkable batsman and still the best in this country .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
No-one will argue with that .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
You just have to look at his record to appreciate that fact . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
SOCCER - ROMANIA CLUB BOSS BANNED FOR HEADBUTT .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
BUCHAREST 1996-08-27

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The Romanian Soccer Federation has banned first division club Jiul Petrosani 's president Miron Cozma for two years for headbutting a visiting team player , a federation statement said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Romania 's soccer bosses also fined Cozma , a well-known miners ' union leader , 10 million lei ( $ 3000 ) for the half-time attack on Dinamo Bucharest 's Danut Lupu last Sunday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Miners led by Cozma rioted in Bucharest in 1990 and 1991 , bringing down the reformist government of premier Petre Roman .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Cozma is awaiting trial for assault and criminal damage in a bar in his home town of Petrosan , 300 kms west of Bucharest .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The attack on Lupu came during a tunnel skirmish between opposing players as they left the field .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" Cozma 's blow was not too painful because I 'm a tall man , " Lupu told Reuters on Tuesday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Lupu is one of the tallest players in Romania 's first division , towering over Cozma by some 17 cms ,

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Jiul Petrosani , promoted to the first division this year , won the league game 1-0 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Cozma is barred from taking part in any official soccer activity during the ban .

Text:
TENNIS - EDBERG EXTENDS GRAND SLAM RUN , TOPPLES WIMBLEDON CHAMP .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Larry Fine

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
NEW YORK 1996-08-27

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Stefan Edberg produced some of his vintage best on Tuesday to extend his grand run at the Grand Slams by toppling Wimbledon champion Richard Krajicek in straight sets at the U.S. Open .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Edberg , competing in the 54th consecutive and final Grand Slam event of his illustrious career , turned back the clock at Stadium Court with a flowing 6-3 6-3 6-3 serve-and-volley victory over the fifth-seeded Dutchman .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" It 's a win that I can be proud of , " said the 30-year-old Swede , winner of two U.S. Opens and six Grand Slam titles in all . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
It 's never easy to beat the Wimbledon champion . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Edberg , who has said he will retire at season 's end , made it look easy under gray skies at the National Tennis Centre .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The unseeded Swede struck quickly , breaking Krajicek in the first game and never let loose his grip on the one hour 44 minute match as he served and volleyed with the grace that made him one of the dominant players of his time .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" There 's not doubt about it , Richard was definitely off his game and I took advantage , " said Edberg .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" I still have my days where I feel great out there . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Also reaching the second round were top-seeded defending champion Pete Sampras , a 6-2 6-2 6-1 winner over last minute replacement Jimy Szymanski of Venezuela , called on after Adrian Voinea of Romania withdrew because of a sprained ankle .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Third seed Thomas Muster of Austria also charged into the second round with a 6-1 7-6 ( 7-2 ) 6-2 romp over Javier Frana of Argentina .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Marcelo Rios of Chile , the 10th seed , also advanced .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Rios claimed a 4-6 6-1 6-4 6-2 victory over Romania 's Andrei Pavel .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
On the women 's side , second seed Monica Seles got off to a strong start by beating fellow-American Anne Miller 6-0 6-1 and was joined in the second round by Spain 's Arantxa Sanchez Vicario ( seeded third ) , Olympic champion Lindsay Davenport ( 8 ) and Karina Habsudova of Slovakia ( 17 ) .

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
In his autobiography published in 1990 , Lanusse described himself as a military man with " democratic ideas . "

Text:
SEOUL 1996-08-27

Text:
South Korea has told its overseas missions to step up security since its embassy in the former Yugoslavia received a threat over Seoul 's crackdown on radical students , the foreign ministry said on Tuesday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
A letter to the Belgrade embassy on Monday under the name of the Macedonian Communist Party demanded South Korea release detained student leaders , a ministry spokesman said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" The letter said the party would assault the embassy , other South Korean-related facilities and Korean nationals unless our authorities released arrested students , " he said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Nearly 400 members of an outlawed student group were arrested after violent protests demanding reunification with communist North Korea were crushed by riot police at a Seoul university this month .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Authorities branded the violence , in which a police officer was killed , as an act of terror .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" The ministry has ordered the embassy to take urgent security measures against possible terrorist attacks , " the official said , asking not to be named .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
It had called for similar precautions at other overseas missions , including those in Canada and Bangladesh where leftist groups have staged protests over the crackdown .

Text:
Nuclear pact will be a step to disarmament-China .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
BEIJING 1996-08-27

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
China on Tuesday reaffirmed its support for a global nuclear test ban treaty blocked by India last week , saying the pact would be an important step in achieving total nuclear disarmament .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" Although the final draft of the treaty probably did n't totally satisfy any country , it was in general balanced , " the official People 's Daily newspaper said in a commentary .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
India blocked the Comprehensive Test Ban Treaty ( CTBT ) at the Conference on Disarmament in Geneva , saying the pact did not contain a clause committing the five declared nuclear powers to a timetable for nuclear disarmament .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
New Delhi 's stance , which was seen as effectively thwarting 2-1/2 years of negotiations at the Conference on Disarmament , drew widespread but generally muted foreign criticism .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
India has also pledged to oppose any forwarding of the draft treaty to the United Nations General Assembly .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
China said many countries had compromised to complete the treaty and that the issue of a disarmament schedule could be discussed in future negotiations .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" The completion of the test ban treaty would be an important and practical step in the gradual process of achieving total nuclear disarmament , " it said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
China has pledged support for the pact since reaching a deal with the United States that made international inspections of nuclear sites more difficult than in earlier drafts of the accord .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The newspaper said China advocated the complete ban and destruction of nuclear weapons but that there was little hope other nuclear powers would soon adopt the same stance .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" Some nuclear powers stubbornly uphold policies of nuclear deterrence based on first use of nuclear weapons , " it said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
China held on July 29 what it said would be its last nuclear test before a self-imposed moratorium that took effect the following day .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
China was the last declared nuclear power to announce a halt to testing .

Text:
Japan declares food poisoning threat receding .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
TOKYO 1996-08-27

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The government said on Tuesday that the threat from a mysterious killer germ , while still requiring vigilance , appears to be receding in the western Japan city of Sakai , where the epidemic hit the hardest .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The food poisoning epidemic caused by the O-157 colon bacillus in Sakai appears to be " settling down " , Health Minister Naoto Kan was quoted by a government spokesman as telling the cabinet .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The O-157 colon bacillus has been found responsible for a widespread food poisoning epidemic that has killed 11 people and made over 9,500 ill this year .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Sakai , near the regional commercial centre of Osaka , has been hit hardest by the deadly bacteria , with nearly 6,500 , mostly schoolchildren , affected by the disease .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Two children in Sakai have died from complications associated with the bacteria .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Kan told a cabinet meeting on Tuesday that no new victims have been reported since August 8 , indicating that the peak has passed , at least for Sakai .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Sakai officials agreed with the assessment , but said it was too early to feel relieved .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" There are still patients hospitalised and problems which must be dealt with , " a city spokesman said , citing the issue of whether to allow children infected with the bacteria but not showing symptoms to attend school from September .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Health authorities believe school lunches were the source of the food poisoning in Sakai , but researchers have been unable to pinpoint the exact source of the infection .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The outbreak has prompted authorities to tighten sanitary standards at slaughterhouses and meatpacking plants and sparked calls for an overhaul of the nation 's school lunch programme .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The ministers agreed at Tuesday 's cabinet meeting to step up inspection measures for school lunches in September and October , when schools around the country resume .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Japan 's Agriculture Ministry also announced that it will compile hygiene guidelines based on U.S. government methods of checking the safety of farm produce to prevent another outbreak of the epidemic .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
As of Monday , 31 children were still hospitalised in Sakai city , of whom six were in serious condition .

Text:
TOKYO 1996-08-27

Text:
Japanese shipments of aluminium mill products in July surged 8.9 percent over the same month last year to 224,609 tonnes , while production rose 6.4 percent to 222,457 tonnes , according to preliminary data released on Tuesday by the Japan Aluminium Federation .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The surge reflected strong demand from the beverage can and housing construction sectors , federation officials said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Figures released two weeks ago from Japan 's seven largest mills already showed that Japan 's can sheet output reached its highest monthly level ever in July , reflecting above-average temperatures that sparked a jump in beer consumption .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
A federation official added that the half-year through September 1996 also appeared likely to set a new record for can production , despite cooler temperatures in August .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
July inventories stood at 75,632 tonnes , down 2.6 percent from the prior month .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
July foil output was off 0.2 percent year-on-year at 11,525 tonnes , while foil shipments fell 0.8 percent to 11,244 tonnes .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
June mill output data were revised slightly downward to 210,622 tonnes from the preliminary 210,683 , while shipments were revised marginally upward to 213,989 tonnes from 213,845 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Final figures for June pegged can stock shipments at 40,144 tonnes , up 2.4 percent year-on-year .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Shipments to the auto sector fell 5.5 percent to 15,286 tonnes , while the construction sector rose 2.4 percent to 79,390 tonnes .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Exports dipped 3.7 percent to 18,867 tonnes .

China thanks Gabon for support on human rights .

Text:
BEIJING 1996-08-27

Text:
China has publicly thanked Gabon for its strong support at the United Nations Human Rights Commission , where Beijing has come under attack from Western nations for its human rights record .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
China 's President Jiang Zemin offered his gratitude in a meeting on Monday with visiting Gabon President Omar Bongo , the official Xinhua news agency said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Jiang also acknowledged the Central African nation 's support for China 's stance on Taiwan , which Beijing views as a renegade province , while Bongo was quoted as thanking China for economic and technological aid , the agency said late on Monday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
In April , China quashed a draft resolution by the U.N. Human Rights Commission expressing concern over continuing reports of Beijing 's violations of fundamental freedoms .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
After the defeat of the resolution , drafted by the European Union and the United States , China 's Foreign Ministry thanked 26 countries for backing its motion for " no action " on the document .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
It was the sixth year in a row that China avoided censure at the U.N. 's main human rights forum .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
China has been accused of a wide range of human rights abuses , often in violation of its own legal code , in an effort to silence dissent .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
A Xinhua commentary earlier this year said a plot by the West to force its human rights standards and values on other countries was doomed to failure .

Text:

Text:
JERUSALEM 1996-08-27

Text:
Palestinian leaders in Jerusalem called on Tuesday for a two-hour strike to protest what they called Israel 's war on Arab East Jerusalem after police demolished a building there .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Israeli police demolished a 10 metre ( yard ) by 20 metre structure in Jerusalem 's Old City they said had been built with funding from the Palestinian self-rule Authority for use as a social club .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Police used a huge crane to lift a bulldozer over the Old City 's walls to reach the building amidst narrow alleys , witnesses said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Bystanders at the scene said work had begun on the building in 1991 and it had yet to be completed when the Israeli police bulldozed it .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The Palestinian Authority was set up under the 1993 PLO-Israel interim peace deal .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" There has been a call for a general strike between one ( 1000 GMT ) and three o'clock , " Palestinian lawmaker Ahmed Hashem Zighayer told Reuters .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" This is a war that has been declared on us and we want our people to come and see the site where they declared the war . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu 's government , which took office in June , has said it will not allow the Authority , set up under a 1993 interim peace deal to control parts of the Gaza Strip and West Bank , to operate in Jerusalem .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Israel 's previous government held the same position but in general turned a blind eye to Palestinian Authority activity in the city .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Tuesday 's demolition came a day after PLO officials said they had bowed to Netanyahu 's demand they close offices in Jerusalem .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
They said two of the three offices Israel wanted closed had been shut .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Netanyahu has made closure of the three offices a condition for resuming peace negotiations with the Palestine Liberation Organisation ( PLO ) .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Israel captured Arab East Jerusalem in the 1967 Middle East war and annexed it .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
It says it will never cede any part of the city .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Palestinians want East Jerusalem as capital of a future state .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The city is up for negotiation at final peace talks which have yet to resume under Netanyahu .

Text:
SEC adopts rules to improve investor access to best stock prices .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
WASHINGTON 1996-08-28

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The Securities and Exchange Commission Wednesday approved rules designed to give stock market investors a better chance at getting the best price available for their orders .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The so-called order handling rules , which were proposed last September , were approved in a 4-0 vote .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The new rules will require specialists at stock exchanges and market makers on Nasdaq to allow customers to view price quotes from other electronic trading systems that may not be readily available to them .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The rules will also require that customer limit orders be displayed with prices better than those available in quotes publicly available at the time .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Specialists and market makers are companies or individuals recognised as qualified to maintain an orderly market in a stock .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
In a limit order , investors specify the price at which they are willing to buy or sell , as opposed to a market order executed at prevailing prices .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" These rules are intended to empower all investors , by allowing their orders to compete on a level playing field , and by providing the disclosure they need to make informed decisions , " said SEC Chairman Arthur Levitt .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The SEC 's goal , he added , was to create " one system where one price could be available to everybody . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The director of the SEC 's division of market regulation , Richard Lindsey , said Wall Street firms will probably need to spend about $ 7 million to carry out the improvements called for by the new rules .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
In proposing the rules last year , the SEC noted that while technology has improved , commonplace practices still existed that worked against investors ' best interests .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
It noted that customers whose orders were not displayed lost the chance of getting the best possible price available in the market .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
It also cited the potential problem of a two-tiered market in which market makers quote one price to public investors while quoting better prices in private systems , thus robbing investors without access to " hidden " quotes the benefit of the best available prices .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Earlier this month , the SEC settled charges of alleged malpractices on Nasdaq when the parent of the Nasdaq market , the National Association of Securities Dealers , agreed to spend $ 100 million over five years to upgrade its oversight of brokers ' trading practices .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The SEC dropped a third proposal that would have allowed investors with market orders to trade at a better price if there were shifts in prices before their orders were executed .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The agency said it would monitor effects of the two new rules before considering the " price improvement " proposal again .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The agency also proposed rule changes that would require continuous " bid " and " ask " quotations from exchange specialists and market makers who trade more than 1 percent of a stock during any quarter on Nasdaq .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The SEC 's limit order display rule will mean a major change for Nasdaq , where such orders have never been displayed .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The president of the Nasdaq , Alfred Berkeley , was to hold a news conference Wednesday afternoon to elaborate on the new rules ' effects on the market , the second largest in the world .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" One locomotive was stationary and the passenger train collided into the back of it , " a police spokesman in Linz told Reuters by telephone .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The express passenger train travelling from Steyr , southeast of Linz , with around 80 people on board , hit the back of a service locomotive used to shunt wagons into sidings .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The police spokesman said he was not sure whether any more passengers were still trapped in the wreckage .

Doctors and medical staff from a hospital across the road from the station were at the scene of the accident within minutes and were able to treat the injured quickly , he added .

Several of the other women 's seeds eased into the second round with more typical Graf-like efficiency Tuesday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
As afternoon turned to evening , fourth-seeded Spaniard Conchita Martinez took apart Romanian Ruxandra Dragomir in 58 minutes with the loss of just two games , one more than second seed Monica Seles , who opened the second-day programme by crushing American Anne Miller 6-0 6-1 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Third seed Arantxa Sanchez Vicario , the 1994 champion , and eighth-seeded Olympic gold medalist Lindsay Davenport dropped three game each en route to the second round .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But the day was not without its seeded casualties on the women 's side .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Fifth-seed Iva Majoli of Croatia was picked off by Austrian Judith Wiesner and Wimbledon semifinalist Kimiko Date of Japan , the 10th seed , fell 6-2 7-5 to 53rd-ranked American Kimberly Po .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Date 's defeat left no other seeded players in Seles 's quarter of the draw , which lost Anke Huber ( 6 ) and Maggie Maleeva ( 12 ) on Monday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But Graf , winner of 20 Grand Slam titles , was not about to join that list .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" At some points I felt a little nervous , " she admitted . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
When it came down to the important points , I felt more confident . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Basuki , a first-round loser here for the fifth consecutive year , was clearly going for winners , hitting the lines and running Graf around the court as she broke the top seed twice in the second set to grab that shocking 5-2 lead .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Graf ran off the next three games to restore some semblance of order .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But Basuki , her long black ponytail flying as she raced for shots , held her serve and twice had set point on Graf 's serve at 6-5 before the German unleashed a forehand pass to force the tie-break .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" I lost the moment , " lamented Basuki , who has reached the fourth round at Wimbledon four times and was a semifinalist in Montreal earlier this month .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Still , the feisty Indonesian got off to a 3-0 lead in the tie-breaker before a pair of costly double faults gave Graf her chance to avoid a third set .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" Usually in the first one or two matches , you want to find your rhythm and want to get into it , " said Graf , who won seven of the last eight points in the breaker .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" To be in that situation today , a couple of times having to play well , get down and play point-by-point , definitely is a good start . "

BASEBALL - SOSA HAS SURGERY , OUT UP TO SIX WEEKS .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
CHICAGO 1996-08-27

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Chicago Cubs right fielder Sammy Sosa underwent surgery on Monday to remove a fractured bone from his right hand and will miss four to six weeks , the club announced Tuesday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Sosa , a leading candidate for National League Most Valuable Player honours , was injured August 20th when he was hit by a Mark Hutton pitch in the first inning of an 8-1 victory over the Florida Marlins .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The 27-year-old Sosa leads the league with 40 homers and is tied for 10th with 100 RBI .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The loss of Sosa , who appeared in all 124 games this season , is a huge blow to the Cubs ' playoff hopes .

Text:
SOCCER - MARCELO HAT-TRICK KEEPS PSV AT TOP OF DUTCH LEAGUE .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
AMSTERDAM 1996-08-28

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Brazilian striker Marcelo scored a hat-trick as PSV Eindhoven maintained their 100 percent record and stayed on top of the Dutch first division with a 3-1 win at Volendam on Wednesday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
PSV 's main rivals for the title , defending champions Ajax Amsterdam , celebrated the novelty of having the roof of their new 51,000 seat stadium closed against the rain , with a 1-0 win over AZ Alkmaar .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Ajax were missing six first-team players but Frank de Boer shot home the winner from a 20-metre free kick in the 30th minute of a dull game .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Marcelo , signed in close season to replace compatriot Ronaldo who left to play for Barcelona , opened the PSV scoring in the 19th minute when he fired home after good work from Rene Eijkelkamp .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The Brazilian found the mark again two minutes after halftime and again in the 56th minute before midfielder Pascal Jongsma scored a consolation goal for Volendam five minutes from time .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Feyenoord Rotterdam suffered an early shock when they went 1-0 down after four minutes against de Graafschap Doetinchem .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The equaliser came in the 73rd minute when Swedish international Henke Larsson scored from close range and 10 minutes later Jean-Paul van Gastel gave Feyenoord a 2-1 victory from the penalty spot .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
After three matches PSV lead the first division with nine points , three points clear of fifth-placed Ajax .

Text:
SOCCER - ROBSON WINS FIRST TROPHY WITH BARCELONA .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
MADRID 1996-08-28

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Former England manager Bobby Robson enjoyed his first success in charge of Barcelona as his team weathered 90 minutes of non-stop Atletico Madrid pressure to win the Spanish Super Cup 6-5 on aggregate on Wednesday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Barcelona had won the first leg 5-2 but the second leg was a different story .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Atletico came within a whisker of taking the Cup on the away-goal rule but squandered several chances after going 3-1 ahead 15 minutes from the end .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Juan Lopez gave Atletico the lead midway through the first half after Barcelona fullback Albert Ferrer and substitute goalkeeper Julen Lopetegui failed to clear a Milinko Pantic cross .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Barcelona 's Hristo Stoichkov made his only significant contribution of the evening 10 minutes after halftime when Sergi Barjuan broke down the right to set up the fiery Bulgarian with a simple equaliser .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But Atletico struck back almost immediately through new signing Juan Eduardo Esnaider and then Serbian set-piece specialist Pantic made it 3-1 with a superb free-kick in the 75th minute .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Robson praised Atletico after the game , which was played in the Community of Madrid athletic stadium because of pitch problems at the Vicente Calderon ground .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The venue of Atletico 's first league game , scheduled for Sunday , is still in doubt with the Real Madrid 's Santiago Bernabeu a distinct possibility .

Text:
ROME 1996-08-28

Text:
UEFA Cup hopefuls Parma and Roma , under new coaches this season , crashed out of the Italian Cup to second division opponents on Wednesday while league champions Milan could only draw 1-1 at humble Empoli .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Wealthy Parma , now coached by the former Italian international Carlo Ancelotti , were without new striker Enrico Chiesa and went down 3-1 at serie B club Pescara in their second round clash .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Pescara 's Ottavio Palladini shattered Parma with goals in the second and fourth minutes .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Midfielder Marco Giampaolo made it 3-0 in the 38th minute and Parma 's Alessandro Melli pulled back a late goal six minutes from time .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The second round was the entry point for the bulk of the serie A sides with the winners going through .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The later stages of the cup are played over two legs .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Parma 's defeat was a repeat of last season 's fiasco when they lost their opening cup match 3-0 to Palermo .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Roma , now coached by Argentine Carlos Bianchi and watched by Italian national coach Arrigo Sacchi , lost 3-1 to Cesena -- another repeat of last season when the Rome club also went out at the first hurdle .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Udinese , with Germany 's Euro ' 96 hero Oliver Bierhoff in their lineup , completed the hat-trick of beaten serie A sides when they went under 2-1 to newly relegated Cremonese .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Milan 's new Uruguayan coach Oscar Tabarez avoided the nightmare of defeat but faces a replay at home next Sunday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Cup holders Fiorentina easily beat Cosenza 3-1 while European Cup holders Juventus also cruised through with a 2-0 win at small southern club Fidelis Andria .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Two other serie A sides lost at the weekend -- Piacenza and last year 's losing finalists Atalanta .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Two cup matches could not be played on Wednesday due to argument over first round results .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Lecce 's 3-0 weekend defeat of Genoa was expected to be overturned by a sporting judge on Thursday after the home club fielded an ineligible player .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
That would set Genoa up for a second round match against local rivals Sampdoria .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Text:
Markus Feldhoff hit a consolation goal for Leverkusen .

SOCCER - SMICER 'S LAST-GASP GOAL KEEPS LENS IN THE LEAD .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
PARIS 1996-08-28

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Euro 96 star Vladimir Smicer of the Czech Republic scored at the last second for Lens , allowing them to retain the lead in the French soccer league on Wednesday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Smicer pushed the ball home in injury time to lead his team to a 3-2 victory over Montpellier , who were leading 2-1 until Cameroon 's Marc-Vivien Foe equalised on a header in the 85th minute .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The win was the fourth in as many matches this season for Lens , who lead the table on 12 points .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
In-form Paris St Germain , who dismissed Nantes 1-0 , are second with 10 points .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Along with Smicer , Robert Pires was the star of the night in France , scoring the first hat-trick of the league season in Metz 's 3-1 home victory over neighbouring Strasbourg .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Pires , one of the most promising strikers in the country , was called up for the first time this week by French manager Aime Jacquet for a friendly against Mexico on Saturday at the Parc des Princes .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Pires scored first with a powerful shot in the 35th minute before striking again from close range just before the break .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
A solitary raid allowed him to score his third in the 74th .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Smicer 's goal was as hard-won as his team 's victory .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Spurred by Foe 's leveller five minutes before , Lens pressed hard and Foe hit the crossbar in the dying seconds on another header .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The ball bounced back to Smicer 's feet and he scored .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Montpellier seized an unexpected lead thanks to Kader Ferhaoui in the fourth minute after a blunder from Lens goalkeeper Jean-Claude Nadon .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The side from northern France , forced to fight an uphill battle from then on , pulled level thanks to Tony Vairelles in the eighth minute but young striker Fabien Lefevre made it two for Montpellier five minutes later .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
League favourites PSG scored a convincing 1-0 win over Nantes and confirmed they would again be the team to beat this season .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Ironically , PSG 's victory owed a lot to two former Nantes players , striker Patrice Loko , who scored on a brilliant shot in the 33rd minute , and defender Benoit Cauet , who started the one-two which allowed Loko to score .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The Parisians , who have yet to concede a goal , were without Brazil 's Leonardo and Panama 's Julio Cesar Dely Valdes , both called up by their national sides .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
For Nantes , who shocked PSG to win the league crown two years ago , the fall is very painful .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The Canaries , who lost most of their key players within two years , have yet to win a match this season .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Text:
WHEAT--Rains boost U.S. HRW planting prospects .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Greg Frost

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
KANSAS CITY , Mo .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
1996-08-28

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Above-normal summer rainfall in the U.S. High Plains has produced near-ideal conditions for planting the 1997 hard red winter wheat crop , analysts said Wednesday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
From central Texas north to Kansas , rains throughout July and August have relieved most of the drought conditions that plagued the region earlier this year .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" Our moisture situation is excellent , especially for fall planting of winter wheat , " said Kim Anderson , extension wheat marketing economist at Oklahoma State University .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The irony of the above-average summer rainfall was not lost on High Plains wheat producers , who only three months ago were caught in a drought so severe that old-timers likened conditions to the " Dust Bowl " days of the 1930s .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" It 's definitely a turnabout from this past year , but you know last year we had pretty good moisture about this time of year , and then about October 1 it quit , " said Mark Hodges , executive director of the Oklahoma Wheat Commission . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Hopefully that 's not going to happen this year . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
According to figures released by the Oklahoma Climatological Survey , an average of 20.19 inches fell across the state between March 1 and August 26 , 1996 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
That 's about 1/2 inch above the average for the same time period , according to Howard Johnson , associate state climatologist at the University of Oklahoma .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
He noted that the majority of that 20.19 inches had fallen since July .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
As an example of just how dry it was , data showed that between October 1 , 1995 and March 1 , 1996 , the state received an average of only 4.6 inches of rainfall .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
In northern Texas , the current rainfall situation was similar to most of Oklahoma , said Rodney Mosier , executive assistant for the Texas Wheat Producers .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" Up here in the Texas Panhandle , we 've had some extremely beneficial rains that came through within the last several days and are really setting us up for ideal conditions for planting wheat , " Mosier said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But he warned that the situation was not as ideal in central and southern Texas , where mositure levels were still short despite the rains brought by Hurricane Dolly last week .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
In Kansas , typically the number one U.S. hard red winter wheat producer , topsoil moisture levels were rated mostly adequate during the week ended Sunday , according to the state 's agricultural statistics service .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
In its weekly report released Monday , the service said Kansas topsoil moisture was rated eight percent surplus , 77 percent adequate and 15 percent short to very short .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Oklahoma 's Agricultural Statistics Service showed similar conditions , rating topsoil moisture levels as seven percent surplus , 81 percent adequate and 12 percent short to very short .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Data on topsoil moisture ratings were not released by the Texas Agricultural Statistics Service .

Text:
Burundi 's ambassador on Wednesday lashed out at economic sanctions imposed by African states and said any thought of an arms embargo would be a windfall for guerrillas fighting his army-run government .

Text:
In a lengthy debate on Burundi before the U.N. Security Council , Ambassador Nsanze Terence said the new military government took over to stabilise the country and wanted negotiations under former Tanzanian President Julius Nyrere .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Nearly every African member who spoke , as well as most Security Council members , however , were unsympathetic towards the government of President Pierre Buyoya , an army major put in power in a July coup by the Tutsi-run military , which is locked in a guerrilla war with the majority Hutus .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
" These ( African ) brothers should have been the first to bind the wounds of Burundi , " Terence said of the economic embargo . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Quite the contrary , Burundi has seen economic war declared against it by fellow African people ... a gratuitous immolation of the people of Burundi . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
He said his government had just asked U.N. human rights monitors to increase their numbers in Burundi in an effort " to put an end to this vicious circle of violence . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
More than 150,000 people have been killed in violence between the minority Tutsis and the majority Hutus since 1993 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Botswana 's envoy , Mothusi Nkgowe , said coups should be relegated " to the dump heap of history " as there could be no justification for the overthrow of a legitimate government .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But Chilean Ambassador Juan Somavia said : " Every weapon that reached Burundi is a weapon aimed mainly at killing an unarmed civilian .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
We must not send a signal different from the African leaders themselves .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Inaction is becoming the worst possible course of action . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Burundi 's parliament has been suspended and political parties are banned but Terence told reporters Buyoya would reconvene a new type of national assembly in October .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
The United States said the coup leaders had taken no steps to restore democracy and indiscriminate killings continued .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
Ambassador Karl Inderfurth said the new government should have " unconditional " negotiations with all parties inside and outside of the country .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
He said Washington strongly supported the economic sanctions imposed already and if these did not work the council would consider " an arms embargo or targeted sanctions against faction leaders . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
But he said the international community had to be prepared for the worst and avoid a replay of the horrors in neighbouring Rwanda , where widespread genocide broke out against the Tutsis two years ago .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Text:
He again said the United Nations should draw up contingency plans for a rapid humanitarian intervention .
